task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three required depreciation schedules with correct terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Depreciations list page in Snipe-IT showing 'IT Equipment - Short Life' (36 months), 'IT Equipment - Standard Life' (60 months), and 'Peripherals' (48 months).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'IT Equipment - Short Life' schedule is assigned to the correct asset models.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models list or individual model edit screens showing the 'IT Equipment - Short Life' depreciation schedule assigned to MacBook Pro 14", Dell XPS 15, ThinkPad X1 Carbon, iPhone 14 Pro, and iPad Air.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'IT Equipment - Standard Life' schedule is assigned to the correct asset models.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models list or individual model edit screens showing the 'IT Equipment - Standard Life' depreciation schedule assigned to Dell OptiPlex 7090, HP Z2 Tower G8, Dell PowerEdge R740, and Cisco Catalyst 9200.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Peripherals' schedule is assigned to the correct asset models.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset Models list or individual model edit screens showing the 'Peripherals' depreciation schedule assigned to Dell UltraSharp U2722D, LG 27UK850-W, and HP LaserJet Pro M404dn.

task_completion.description: Verify the purchase cost and date updates for ASSET-DEP001 and ASSET-DEP002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the All Assets list (with relevant columns enabled) or individual asset pages showing ASSET-DEP001 with Purchase Cost $1,849.00 and Date 2023-06-15, and ASSET-DEP002 with Purchase Cost $12,499.00 and Date 2022-03-20.

task_completion.description: Verify the purchase cost and date updates for ASSET-DEP003 and ASSET-DEP004.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the All Assets list (with relevant columns enabled) or individual asset pages showing ASSET-DEP003 with Purchase Cost $449.00 and Date 2024-01-10, and ASSET-DEP004 with Purchase Cost $2,199.00 and Date 2023-11-01.

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates must be visible within the actual Snipe-IT application UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages (e.g., 'Asset updated successfully', 'Depreciation created successfully') or updated lists reflecting the saved changes in the Snipe-IT UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Depreciations: 'IT Equipment - Short Life' (36 months), 'IT Equipment - Standard Life' (60 months), 'Peripherals' (48 months). Expected Assignments: Short Life (MacBook Pro 14, Dell XPS 15, ThinkPad X1 Carbon, iPhone 14, iPad Air), Standard Life (OptiPlex 7090, HP Z2, PowerEdge R740, Catalyst 9200), Peripherals (UltraSharp, LG 27UK850, LaserJet). Expected Asset Corrections: ASSET-DEP001 (Cost $1849.00, Date 2023-06-15), ASSET-DEP002 (Cost $12499.00, Date 2022-03-20), ASSET-DEP003 (Cost $449.00, Date 2024-01-10), ASSET-DEP004 (Cost $2199.00, Date 2023-11-01).
